'''DeGerrillion''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] where criminals [[Marg Sonat]] and [[Pari' Notgoth]] were almost killed.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Art of Betrayal|book=The Politics of Contraband|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
